sources.claim: AI-Powered Software Testing & QA Market: $9.32B (2025) → $11.99B (2026) → $39.43B (2031) at 26.88% CAGR. Security testing fastest segment at 27.88% CAGR.
Agentic AI For Enterprise Application Testing Market: $8.56B (2025) → $100.19B (2033) at 36% CAGR.
Software Testing and QA Services Market: $50.67B (2026) → $107.25B (2033) at 11.5% CAGR.
$1.5B+ flowing into autonomous AI testing agents in 2026; Momentic customer roster (Notion, Webflow, Retool); autonomous QA market overview.
Tricentis acquires Testim for $200M (February 2022) — landmark M&A validating AI-powered testing category.
EU AI Act Article 9 mandates adversarial robustness testing for high-risk AI systems by August 2, 2026; penalties up to €35M or 7% of global turnover.
72% of Fortune 500 enterprises deploying AI-driven or agent-based testing tools across ERP, CRM, and cloud-native platforms in 2026; agentic QE platform capabilities.
Momentic total funding $22.8M ($500K pre-seed YC, $3.7M seed FundersClub Mar 2025, $15M Series A Standard Capital Nov 2025); customer base and platform positioning.
Platform comparison: Mabl $120M+ raised; BlinqIO BDD/Gherkin positioning; Katalon 30K+ users; Applitools visual AI leader; top 8 agentic QA tools compared.
QA Trends 2026: 89% of enterprises pilot GenAI in quality engineering; 40% of large enterprises have AI in CI/CD workflows; shift-left adoption 48% (2020) to 72% (2026).
